steps.title: Graph or substitute
steps.content: A fast check is to graph both lines in Desmos and read the intersection. Algebraically, substitute $y=6x+16$ into the second equation.

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: The solution is $(-4,-8)$. Substituting gives $-8=6(-4)+16$ and $-7(-4)-(-8)=36$, so choice A is correct.
